query: SELECT id, cobertizo_id, localizacion, CONCAT('[', producto, ']') as producto_bracketed, LENGTH(producto) as producto_len FROM paradas WHERE LOWER(TRIM(producto)) = 'bluey' LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4MNpKPTYaa3AiSj.root --database NB4DzLv3DwSWij5HcQ7rQi --execute SELECT id, cobertizo_id, localizacion, CONCAT('[', producto, ']') as producto_bracketed, LENGTH(producto) as producto_len FROM paradas WHERE LOWER(TRIM(producto)) = 'bluey' LIMIT 10;
